calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Irrevocable Trust [Prob. Code Secs. 15409(A); 17200(B)(13)]
Off Calendar May-06-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PTR-14-297463 The Katharine Anne Rivett 2007 Irrevocable Trust, PTR-14-297463 The Robert William Rivett 2007 Irrevocable Trust and PTR-14-297465 The Sarah Emilia Riivett 2007 Irrevocable Trust.

Appearances: Vivian Redsar for William Hopkins (Petitioner).

Ms. Redsar explained why the Trustee prefers to proceed under Probate Code 15409 (a) and stated that it's a consent by omission. All three Petitions for Modification of Irrevocable Trust were taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
